ddls:
CREATE TABLE "search_engines" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search engine */,
  "short_name" TEXT /* Short name of the search engine */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* Keyword associated with the search engine */,
  "favicon_url" TEXT /* URL of the favicon for the search engine */,
  "url" TEXT /* Base URL of the search engine */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the search engine was created */,
  "modification_date" TEXT /* Date when the search engine was last modified */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the search engine is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "web_services" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each web service */,
  "short_name" TEXT /* Short name of the web service */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* Keyword associated with the web service */,
  "favicon_url" TEXT /* URL of the favicon for the web service */,
  "url" TEXT /* Base URL of the web service */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the web service was created */,
  "modification_date" TEXT /* Date when the web service was last modified */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the web service is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "search_engine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the search engine associated with the analytics data */,
  "web_service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the web service associated with the analytics data */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the search engine or web service was used */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the analytics record was created */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date when the analytics record was last modified */,
  "avg_response_time" REAL /* Average response time for the search engine or web service */,
  "total_bytes_transferred" INTEGER /* Total bytes transferred for the search engine or web service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_search_engine_id FOREIGN KEY ("search_engine_id") REFERENCES search_engines ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_web_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("web_service_id") REFERENCES web_services ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "input_encodings" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each input encoding record */,
  "search_engine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the search engine associated with the input encoding */,
  "web_service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the web service associated with the input encoding */,
  "encoding" TEXT /* Input encoding used by the search engine or web service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_input_encodings_search_engine_id FOREIGN KEY ("search_engine_id") REFERENCES search_engines ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_input_encodings_web_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("web_service_id") REFERENCES web_services ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policies" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy record */,
  "search_engine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the search engine associated with the policy */,
  "web_service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the web service associated with the policy */,
  "policy" TEXT /* Policy for creating and managing the web service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policies_search_engine_id FOREIGN KEY ("search_engine_id") REFERENCES search_engines ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policies_web_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("web_service_id") REFERENCES web_services ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logos" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each logo record */,
  "search_engine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the search engine associated with the logo */,
  "web_service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the web service associated with the logo */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the logo for the search engine or web service */,
  "logo_type" TEXT /* Type of logo (e.g., image, icon, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logos_web_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("web_service_id") REFERENCES web_services ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logos_search_engine_id FOREIGN KEY ("search_engine_id") REFERENCES search_engines ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instant_urls" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instant URL record */,
  "search_engine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the search engine associated with the instant URL */,
  "web_service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the web service associated with the instant URL */,
  "instant_url" TEXT /* Instant URL for the search engine or web service */,
  "instant_url_type" TEXT /* Type of instant URL (e.g., search, suggest, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instant_urls_web_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("web_service_id") REFERENCES web_services ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instant_urls_search_engine_id FOREIGN KEY ("search_engine_id") REFERENCES search_engines ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suggest_urls" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each suggest URL record */,
  "search_engine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the search engine associated with the suggest URL */,
  "web_service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the web service associated with the suggest URL */,
  "suggest_url" TEXT /* Suggest URL for the search engine or web service */,
  "suggest_url_type" TEXT /* Type of suggest URL (e.g., search, autocomplete, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suggest_urls_web_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("web_service_id") REFERENCES web_services ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suggest_urls_search_engine_id FOREIGN KEY ("search_engine_id") REFERENCES search_engines ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sync_guids" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each synchronization GUID record */,
  "search_engine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the search engine associated with the synchronization GUID */,
  "web_service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the web service associated with the synchronization GUID */,
  "sync_guid" TEXT /* Synchronization GUID for the search engine or web service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sync_guids_web_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("web_service_id") REFERENCES web_services ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sync_guids_search_engine_id FOREIGN KEY ("search_engine_id") REFERENCES search_engines ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_settings" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security settings record */,
  "search_engine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the search engine associated with the security settings */,
  "web_service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the web service associated with the security settings */,
  "authentication_protocol" TEXT /* Authentication protocol used by the search engine or web service */,
  "encryption_method" TEXT /* Encryption method used by the search engine or web service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_settings_search_engine_id FOREIGN KEY ("search_engine_id") REFERENCES search_engines ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_settings_web_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("web_service_id") REFERENCES web_services ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "availability_zones" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each availability zone record */,
  "search_engine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the search engine associated with the availability zone */,
  "web_service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the web service associated with the availability zone */,
  "zone_name" TEXT /* Name of the availability zone */,
  "zone_location" TEXT /* Location of the availability zone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_availability_zones_search_engine_id FOREIGN KEY ("search_engine_id") REFERENCES search_engines ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_availability_zones_web_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("web_service_id") REFERENCES web_services ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_level_agreements" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service level agreement record */,
  "search_engine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the search engine associated with the service level agreement */,
  "web_service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the web service associated with the service level agreement */,
  "sla_description" TEXT /* Description of the service level agreement */,
  "sla_target" TEXT /* Target for the service level agreement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_level_agreements_search_engine_id FOREIGN KEY ("search_engine_id") REFERENCES search_engines ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_level_agreements_web_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("web_service_id") REFERENCES web_services ("id")
)
